sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check if pos 3 is still editable and scan other positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
top_pink = {'cddd7d2c6a6ceea0', 'd38ad0a046a963a0', 'fb80c9b281b063da', 'f4469c244897540c', '12ee96cc93cd3e0a', 'b4edb3faf810133b'}

# Check current pos 3 hash
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'B':
        min_row = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
        min_col = min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
        if 50 <= min_row <= 57 and (min_col - 15) // 7 == 3:
            print(f"Pos 3 current: {n['hash']}")

# Go to pos 0 (LEFT x3)
action(['LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT'])

# Scan pos 0
print("\nPos 0 variants:")
for i in range(7):
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    nodes = seg['nodes']
    for n in nodes:
        if n['color'] == 'B':
            min_row = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
            min_col = min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
            if 50 <= min_row <= 57 and (min_col - 15) // 7 == 0:
                h = n['hash']
                match = "✓" if h in top_pink else " "
                print(f"  Variant {i}: {h} {match}")
    if i < 6:
        action(['UP'])

# Go to pos 1 (RIGHT)
action(['RIGHT'])

# Scan pos 1
print("\nPos 1 variants:")
for i in range(7):
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    nodes = seg['nodes']
    for n in nodes:
        if n['color'] == 'B':
            min_row = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
            min_col = min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
            if 50 <= min_row <= 57 and (min_col - 15) // 7 == 1:
                h = n['hash']
                match = "✓" if h in top_pink else " "
                print(f"  Variant {i}: {h} {match}")
    if i < 6:
        action(['UP'])

# Go to pos 2 (RIGHT)
action(['RIGHT'])

# Scan pos 2
print("\nPos 2 variants:")
for i in range(7):
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    nodes = seg['nodes']
    for n in nodes:
        if n['color'] == 'B':
            min_row = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
            min_col = min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
            if 50 <= min_row <= 57 and (min_col - 15) // 7 == 2:

</function>
